nasb.text: Dan shall be a serpent in the way, A horned snake in the path, That bites the horse’s heels, So that his rider falls backward.

esv.text: Dan shall be a serpent in the way, a viper by the path, that bites the horse’s heels so that his rider falls backward.

cnv.text: 但要作路上的蛇， 道中的毒蛇， 他要咬傷馬蹄， 使騎馬的人向後墜落。

ccb.text: 他必成为路边的蛇， 道旁的毒蛇， 咬伤马蹄，使骑马的人坠落。

csbs.text: 但必作道旁的蛇，路边的毒蛇， 咬马的脚跟，使骑马的向后坠落。
